nodes.context: Ethnically based organized crime network involved in drug trafficking, assassination, land grabbing, arms smuggling.
Indian underworld mobster Dawood Ibrahim's organization, with strategic alliance with Pakistan's ISI.
Gang led by Rehman Dakait, involved in criminal activities in Pakistan.
Gang led by Ghulam 'Chotu' Rasool, engaged in kidnapping, murder, smuggling, gun-running, highway robberies in Punjab.
Turkish organized crime family, allies of the Pakistani mafia.

edges.context: D-Company has a strategic alliance with Pakistan's Inter-Services Intelligence, which is part of the Pakistani mafia network.
The Baybaşin family is listed as an ally of the Pakistani mafia.
